title: M3-02b: Implement auto-restart with up to 3 attempts and 2s delay
acceptance_criteria: On crash detection, attempts restart up to 3 times
On success: logs 'Agent restarted. Resuming...' and updates session status to 'active'
After 3 failed attempts: logs 'Agent repeatedly crashed. Please restart manually.' and sets session status to 'failed'
Restart counter resets after successful restart
